title: Tenant Configuration
description: Tenant-level configuration overlay for governance profile and addon selection.

version.description: Semver of this tenant config schema.

default_profile.description: Default profile to use for this tenant (e.g., 'profile.python-safety').

allowed_addons.description: List of addon IDs that this tenant is allowed to use.

blocked_addons.description: List of addon IDs that are blocked for this tenant.

audit_verbosity.description: Audit verbosity level for this tenant.
